---
name: Translation improvement
about: Suggest a fix or improvement to a translated landing page
title: "[i18n] "
labels: i18n, documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Which page?**
- [ ] French (`docs/fr/index.html`)
- [ ] Portuguese (`docs/pt/index.html`)
- [ ] Arabic (`docs/ar/index.html`)
- [ ] Other (specify):

**The current text**
<!-- Quote the exact phrase from the page. Include the surrounding sentence so we can find it. -->

**Proposed improvement**
<!-- Your suggested replacement. Native speakers very welcome. -->

**Why?**
<!-- Awkward phrasing? Mistranslation? Wrong register (formal vs informal)? Regional variant? -->

**Are you a native speaker of this language?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, but I'm fluent
- [ ] No

(Native speakers help us most — we don't need to interpret nuance.)
